core_beliefs.belief: 创造性破坏是资本主义的根本事实
core_beliefs.source: creative destruction is the essential fact about capitalism

core_beliefs.belief: 创新来自企业家或'野性精神'
core_beliefs.source: the innovation and technological change of a nation come from entrepreneurs or wild spirits
big business may have had more to do with creating that standard of life than with keeping it down
core_beliefs.explanation: 熊彼特颠覆传统对大公司的看法

core_beliefs.belief: 民主是领导人之间竞争的机制
core_beliefs.source: the theory of democracy is simply that the equipment for arriving at political decisions is supplied to the population

core_beliefs.belief: 企业家的职能是革新生产模式
core_beliefs.source: the function of entrepreneurs is to reform or revolutionize the pattern of production
core_beliefs.explanation: 熊彼特定义企业家的核心职能

core_beliefs.source: capitalism would gradually weaken itself and eventually collapse
core_beliefs.explanation: 熊彼特与马克思相同的预言

core_beliefs.source: innovation-driven clusters as the cause of long cycles
core_beliefs.explanation: 熊彼特的商业周期理论

core_beliefs.source: three goals in life: greatest economist, best horseman, greatest lover

key_themes: 民主是领导人之间竞争
